55383.title: Fresh Yoga
55383.description: Katy helps unleash the power of love that lies dormant, as well as well-being and kindness, through yoga.

55426.title: Fresh Yoga
55426.description: The different outdoor episodes make us discover the magnificent panoramas between sky and sea, light and shade. In this episode, Katy shows you how to wake up your senses and embody nature.
